Memo to Helen
Subject: While you were away

Hi Helen,

Hope you had a great holiday! Quick recap of the week.

The vendor missed the integration plan deadline on Friday. T. Reyes emailed late Friday saying they'd revert with a new date. I added it to the RAID log and figured I'd wait for you to come back so you could chase the vendor relationship since you own that.

M. Whitfield emailed me about a regulatory question on split-jurisdiction reporting. I didn't know the answer. I sent him a polite email letting him know that you were on leave and would respond when you got back.

Also, on the status report — I noticed late Friday that the finance figure was wrong by about £47k. The report had already gone out though. I figured we could send a correction when you got back since you signed it off and people would want to hear from you.

Raj and Priya were supposed to start dependent work this morning but couldn't because they didn't have the integration plan. I told them you'd be back in nine days.

Otherwise things are fine.

Welcome back!
Coordinator
